meta.title: Campus — Jaket Angkatan, Merch Ospek & Wisuda | Kustom Garment
meta.description: Dari ospek sampai wisuda — jaket angkatan, kaos panitia, jersey turnamen, sampai totebag himpunan. Custom anak kampus, tanpa minimum order.

hero.sub: Jaket angkatan, kaos panitia, jersey turnamen, sampai totebag himpunan. Apa pun acara kampusmu, kami bikin merch-nya rapi dan kelar tepat waktu.

_note: CMS-editable content for the /campus category page. Product grid is driven by src/data/products/catalog.json (managed separately) and is NOT here.
